results.rendered_html:
madirā
1 Spirituous liquor; kāṃkṣatyanyo vadanamadirāṃ dohadacchadmanāsyāḥ  Me. 78 ;  Śi. 11. 49. 
2 A kind of
(pb) wagtail.
3 N. of Durgā.
Comp.
— utkaṭa, -unmatta a. intoxicated with spirituous liquor.
— gṛhaṃ, -śālā an alehouse, dram-house, a tavern.
— sakhaḥ the mango tree.
